name: Ask Max
description: Lets the agent escalate a real doubt to the operator's WhatsApp instead of guessing or saying it doesn't know, then routes the operator's reply back to the original conversation.

channel.description: Channel id to deliver the escalation to (e.g. "whatsapp-cloud").

to.description: Fixed operator contact id on that channel (e.g. a WhatsApp phone number).

accountId.description: Optional channel account id, when the channel has more than one configured account.
